zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Grey於1378年6月1日出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾維爾頓時，她的父親Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton38歲，母親Elizabeth Talbot26歲。她於大約1397年與Lord John D'Arcy of Knayth在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1454年6月1日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾蓋斯波洛享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Grey于1378年6月1日出生在英国英格兰維爾爾維爾頓时，她的父亲Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton38岁，母亲Elizabeth Talbot26岁。她于大约1397年与Lord John D'Arcy of Knayth在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1454年6月1日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾蓋斯波洛享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Grey was born on 1 June 1378, in Wilton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton, was 38 and her mother, Elizabeth Talbot, was 26. She married Lord John D'Arcy of Knayth about 1397, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 1 June 1454, in Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Grey est née le 1 juin 1378, à Wilton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Talbot, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Lord John D'Arcy of Knayth environ 1397, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 juin 1454, à Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Grey am 1. Juni 1378 in Wilton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton 38 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Talbot 26. Sie hat um 1397 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Lord John D'Arcy of Knayth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Juni 1454 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Grey è nata il il 1 giugno 1378 nel Wilton, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Talbot, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Lord John D'Arcy of Knayth circa 1397, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 1 giugno 1454, nel Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Greyが1378年6月1日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアウィルトンで生まれた時，父Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wiltonは38歳，母Elizabeth Talbotは26歳であった。約1397年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでLord John D'Arcy of Knaythと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1454年6月1日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアガインスボロウで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Grey(이)가 1378년 6월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 윌턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Talbot(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1397년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Lord John D'Arcy of Knayth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1454년 6월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 게인스버루그h에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Grey nasceu em 1 de junho de 1378, em Wilton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Talbot, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord John D'Arcy of Knayth aproximadamente 1397, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de junho de 1454, em Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Grey родилась 1 июня 1378 г. в местности уилтон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Talbot, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord John D'Arcy of Knayth около 1397 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 1 июня 1454 г. в местности геинсбороую, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Grey nació el 1 de junio de 1378, en Wilton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Talbot, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Lord John D'Arcy of Knayth aproximadamente 1397, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 1 de junio de 1454, en Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años.
